zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir於大約1010年出生在法國迪瑟 度 曼斯a奧-度-洛易時，他的父親Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan38歲，母親Countess Rantlina de Blois34歲。他於1029年與Armenbourge Vergy在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易a奧結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1067年6月30日之前在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特勒 曼斯a奧-度-洛易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir于大约1010年出生在法国迪瑟 度 曼斯a奧-度-洛易时，他的父亲Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan38岁，母亲Countess Rantlina de Blois34岁。他于1029年与Armenbourge Vergy在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易a奧结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1067年6月30日之前在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特勒 曼斯a奧-度-洛易。

nameMeanings.name: Brochard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: occupational name derived from broc ‘jug, pot with a neck’ (from Greek brochis), denoting either a manufacturer of jugs or a wine merchant.
from the ancient Germanic personal name Burghard (see Burkhart ), Latinized in the Middle Ages as Brocardus.

variants.name: Burkhart
meanings: German: from the medieval personal name Burkhard, from ancient Germanic Burghard, composed of the elements burg ‘fort, castle’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This form of the surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and in Czechia (compare 2 below), but it is very rare there. Compare also Borgardt , Brookhart , Burgert , Burghart , Burkart , and Burkett .
Germanized form of Polish and Czech Burkert , Czech Purkert or Purkart, and Slovenian Purkart: from a German variant and Slavicized forms of the medieval German personal name Burkhard (see 1 above).

variants.name: Brokaw
meanings: Altered form, under American Dutch influence, of French Brocard, a variant of Brochard . Compare Bercaw , Bragaw , and Burcaw .

History: Bourgan Brocard (also recorded as Broucard), a French Huguenot exile, came to Long Island in 1675 (via Germany), and Bourgon Brokaw, evidently the same person, was a witness in 1717 at the baptism at the Dutch Church in Jamaica, Long Island. Most of his family later moved to NJ. His descendants also bear the surnames Bercaw, Bragaw, and Burcaw. In the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors, the progenitor is listed as Bourgeon Broucard or Brokaw or Bragaw, and in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America as Bourgon Broucard.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir was born about 1010, in Château-du-Loir, Diocese of Le Mans, France, his father, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, was 38 and his mother, Countess Rantlina de Blois, was 34. He married Armenbourge Vergy in 1029, in Château, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died before 30 June 1067, in Château-du-Loir, Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir est né environ 1010, à Château-du-Loir, Diocèse du Mans, France, son père, Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Countess Rantlina de Blois, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Armenbourge Vergy en 1029, à Château, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé avant 30 juin 1067, à Château-du-Loir, Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

Er hat 1029 in Château, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich Armenbourge Vergy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 30. Juni 1067 in Château-du-Loir, Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loirが約1010年にフランスディオクeゼ ダ マンスチaテアウ-ドウ-ロイルで生まれた時，父Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinanは38歳，母Countess Rantlina de Bloisは34歳であった。1029年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーチaテアウでArmenbourge Vergyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1067年6月30日以前にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスル マンスチaテアウ-ドウ-ロイルで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Brochard Seigneur de Château-du-Loir(이)가 대략 1010년 프랑스 디오ce스 드 먼스 cha테오-드-로이르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hammon de Saint Sauveur I Vicomte de Dinan(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Rantlina de Blois(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1029년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 cha테오에서 Armenbourge Vergy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1067년 6월 30일 이전 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 일 먼스 cha테오-드-로이르에서 사망했다.
